expectations.text: Does NOT draft an offer letter
expectations.evidence: Output states: 'This request is outside the scope of the /reference skill.' No offer letter content generated.

expectations.text: Redirects to the appropriate skill or resource for offer letters
expectations.evidence: States: 'Use /draft-offer — that is the correct skill for drafting offer letters with salary, start date, benefits, and terms of employment.' Provides list of information to give /draft-offer.

expectations.text: Does NOT attempt to generate contractual employment documents
expectations.evidence: No contractual language generated. Output explains why routing matters: 'Generating an offer letter under the /reference skill would bypass the specific legal and compliance checks that offer letters require (e.g., compensation band validation, benefits eligibility, at-will or fixed-term language, non-compete clauses).'
